Rationale: P166 'award received' is the standard Wikidata property for winning an award. Semantically identical.
P136 'genre' maps directly to prop:hasGenre. Both assert the genre of a musical work or artist.
P358 'discography' groups all releases; prop:releasedAlbum is narrower (albums only).
P264 'record label' is the canonical Wikidata property for artist-label affiliation.
P495 'country of origin' matches prop:originatesFrom for both artists and albums.
P175 links a work to a performer, not artist-to-artist. No exact Wikidata equivalent exists for direct collaboration.
P737 'influenced by' is a direct semantic match to prop:influencedBy.
P175 'performer' is the closest match for album->artist. prop:producedBy is narrower (emphasises production role).
P569 is a full timestamp; prop:birthYear is year-only (coarser granularity).
P577 is a full timestamp; prop:releaseYear stores year only.
P444 stores review scores as strings; prop:albumRating is a typed decimal. Related but different datatype semantics.
P571 'inception' is a full timestamp; prop:foundedYear is year-only.
P279 is the generic subclass relation; prop:partOfGenre is genre-specific.
